pain_points.signal: High cost per authentication with perceived low value
App crashes and technical instability preventing use
Inaccurate authentication results (real items deemed fake, fakes deemed authentic)
Poor or robotic customer support with unhelpful responses

Token/credit system confusion and perceived scam (free tokens not usable, credits lost)
Slow or no refunds for incorrect results
App or service shutting down after payment

desired_outcomes.outcome: Fast, reliable authentication for peace of mind in online shopping (e.g., eBay)
Accurate, consistent results verified by multiple authenticators or cross-checking
Easy-to-use, stable app with quick turnaround (<10 mins)
Fair pricing (value for cost) and transparent token/credit system
Responsive, helpful customer support for questions and disputes
Non-destructive authentication process

purchase_triggers.trigger: Comparison to other apps (e.g., CheckCheck) showing superior process (more pictures, dual authentication)

switching_triggers.from_product: Competitor products with better fit or support.
switching_triggers.reason: Persistent discomfort or pain.
switching_triggers.threshold: Immediate physical discomfort or repeated sizing failures.

deal_breakers: Poor fit causing pain or dysfunction
Critical design flaws (e.g., heel cup issues, slipping off)

top_pain_points.signal: Sizing issues: items run narrow (especially in toes), small, large, or do not fit as expected, requiring sizing up/down or adjustments
Poor durability: materials thin, low quality, fraying after washing, or wearing down quickly, not standing up to harsh conditions
Comfort issues: shoes narrow, seams cause irritation, clothing restricts movement or causes chafing, not comfortable for long wear
Inaccurate product descriptions: color not as shown, material different than expected, warmth inadequate, or misleading fit
Lack of support for specific work needs: insufficient warmth in cold, not moisture-wicking enough, poor design for field work
Durability issues (split seams, broken straps)
Fit unpredictability (clothing sizing varies wildly)
Material quality degradation after washing
Product does not match description/photo
Poor fit for certain body types (height, width)
Sizing inconsistencies across same brand/product line
Material degradation after washing (shrinkage, pilling)

top_desired_outcomes.signal: Reliable durability for harsh outdoor conditions and extended wear, including resistance to wear and washing
Accurate sizing with consistent fit across products and clear size charts to reduce ordering errors
Comfort for long hours of wear, including no chafing, good fit, and adequate arch/foot support
Functional performance in specific conditions: warmth in cold, moisture-wicking, water resistance, and suitability for field work
Quality materials that match description and expectations, with no fraying, fading, or damage after minimal use
Comfortable footwear for long workdays
Reliable durability in challenging conditions
Accurate sizing and fit
Value for money (quality vs price)
Support for specific physical needs (plantar fasciitis, high arches)
Accurate and consistent sizing for reliable purchase
Durable materials that withstand washing and wear without degradation

top_deal_breakers.signal: Poor durability or rapid wear
Severe sizing issues with no resolution
Material misrepresentation (e.g., not as warm/advertised)
Critical comfort flaws (e.g., chafing, irritation)
Premature product failure (splitting, breaking)
Significant sizing inaccuracies
False advertising (material/color mismatch)
Poor wash durability
Sizing that doesn't match stated measurements
Durability failures under work conditions

top_purchase_triggers.signal: Positive brand reputation or prior positive experience with the brand (e.g., Outdoor Research)
Product features align with specific work or activity needs (e.g., fieldwork, walking, cold weather)
Recommendation or positive reviews highlighting durability and fit
Need for comfortable, all-day footwear
Need for weather-resistant outerwear
Gift purchase for family members
Need for supportive footwear for medical conditions
Need for work-appropriate footwear/clothing for outdoor environments
